plan.md.author: user

plan.md.text: you are showing the %!actor% example, I dont want the coder thinking that he needs to implement that, it was just an example and future feature
plan.md.anchor: - **Leading `!` = the property plane against the implicit root**: `%!app%` ≡ `%this!app%`, `%!actor%` → the app's `actor`. (`!` already exists in the grammar; this is not new syntax. It does not collide with `if !%x%` — the LLM resolves that into `module.condition` at build.)
plan.md.author: user

plan.md.text: Rank is in the wrong location, it's not the responsiblity of Data to know type rank, it the responsiblity of a type to know its rank, so this should be this.Type.Rank(other) <-- do not decompose to other.Type. that can return the winner.
plan.md.author: user
